criteria.reason: Authenticated retry endpoint is implemented, route ownership is guarded, and web Operator exposes a retry action for retryable jobs.
Retry plan gates on typed reliability states and blocks processing jobs.
Paid retry requires explicit confirm_retry before side effects.
Confirmed retry delegates to the existing paid map refresh enqueue boundary and leaves the source job untouched.
Guardrails and service output preserve no-provider-write, no-direct-Apify, no-customer-message, no-charge-at-request boundaries.
Targeted py_compile, pytest, backend lint, frontend build, and diff checks passed.

commands_run: python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_refresh_retry.py src/services/operator_refresh_result.py src/services/telegram_dashboard.py src/api/operator_api.py src/worker.py

PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_refresh_retry.py tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_refresh_telegram_followup.py tests/test_worker_apify_settlement.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
